app_tagline: Connecter les chercheurs sociaux avec une cuisine premium
unfollow_confirm: Voulez-vous ne plus suivre ce membre?
reset_data_warn: Êtes-vous sûr? Toutes vos données locales seront supprimées.

faq.title: Help & Support
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and learn how to get the most out of DineBuddies.

user_questions.q: How do I create a private invitation?
user_questions.a: Tap the + button or open a restaurant card and select "Create Invitation". Set the time, guest count, and who pays the bill.
When you request to join a private invitation, the host receives a notification. If they accept, a private chat room will instantly unlock for both of you.
Dating invitations are high-intent premium dining dates. You need a Premium subscription to actively explore dating invitations and chat with hosts.

user_questions.q: How do I upgrade to Premium?
user_questions.a: Go to Settings > Subscription or click any of the golden upgrade banners in the app to access our premium tiers.
Every restaurant has a public community chat where you can browse recent posts, ask questions, and mingle with other food lovers.

business_questions.q: How do I publish a Featured Post?
business_questions.a: In your Pro Dashboard, open the 'New Featured Post' tab, upload your high-quality banner, write a caption, and deploy it straight to everyone's feed.

business_questions.q: How do Offers and Credits work?
business_questions.a: In the Offers section, you can create exclusive digital packages. Customers claim them, and you can redeem their points securely using our built-in scanner.

business_questions.q: Why should I join my community chat?
business_questions.a: Your restaurant's community chat is your direct line to guests. Answer queries, build hype for events, and foster brand loyalty instantly.
Limits like Featured Posts availability are governed by your subscription tier (Free, Pro, Elite). Upgrade via the Subscription tab for more tools.

seo.title: DineBuddies | Premium Social Dining & Exclusive Food Network
seo.description: DineBuddies is an exclusive social dining network where food lovers meet, join private restaurant invitations, and connect over premium meals.
